title: lomelosia persica
intro: Lomelosia persica is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caprifoliaceae. It is also known as the Persian bugloss, and is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Lomelosia persica include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing digestive issues.
